notes: 10 unlabelled user issues blocked by integrity policy (cannot read). Issue #259 is the CI caching proposal (needs manual PR creation with workflows permission). Latest release: 5.1.0 (April 26, 2026). All April PRs merged — 5.1.0 released. This run: os improvements PR (os.walk, makedirs exist_ok, getpid/getppid, os.path.isabs/islink/realpath/getsize) and README stdlib table update PR. Monthly activity issue #250 closed; May 2026 issue created. Future stdlib candidates: functools.partial (needs design), io, socket.
